subject: docs+fix: document frontmatter contract, harden parser
body:
- Added frontmatter contract documentation to CLAUDE.md's
  Implementation Patterns section (required fields, how it works,
  generatePatternManifest plugin)
- Hardened parseFrontmatter and stripFrontmatter against \r\n
  line endings (Windows git clients)
- Added slug format validation: must be lowercase alphanumeric
  with hyphens (rejects invalid slugs at build time)

Tags: documentation, hardening, patterns
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
